name: SquashAttest
description: Run EU AI Act compliance attestation on an AI model artifact. Generates CycloneDX ML-BOM, SPDX SBOM, runs policy checks, and produces a signed audit record.
author: Konjo AI

inputs.name: modelPath
inputs.label: Model path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to the model directory or artifact to attest.

inputs.name: policies
inputs.label: Compliance policies
inputs.helpMarkDown: Comma-separated list of policy templates to evaluate (e.g. eu-ai-act,nist-ai-rmf).

inputs.name: sign
inputs.label: Sign via Sigstore
inputs.helpMarkDown: Sign the CycloneDX BOM using Sigstore keyless signing.

inputs.name: failOnViolation
inputs.label: Fail on policy violation
inputs.helpMarkDown: Fail the pipeline step if any policy error-severity finding is raised.

inputs.name: outputDir
inputs.label: Output directory
inputs.helpMarkDown: Directory to write attestation artifacts. Defaults to the model directory.

outputVariables.name: SQUASH_PASSED
outputVariables.description: true if all policies passed, false otherwise.

outputVariables.name: SQUASH_SCAN_STATUS
outputVariables.description: ModelScan security scan status: clean, warning, or error.

outputVariables.name: SQUASH_CYCLONEDX_PATH
outputVariables.description: Path to the generated CycloneDX 1.7 ML-BOM JSON file.

outputVariables.name: SQUASH_SPDX_JSON_PATH
outputVariables.description: Path to the generated SPDX 2.3 SBOM JSON file.

outputVariables.name: SQUASH_MASTER_RECORD_PATH
outputVariables.description: Path to the master attestation record JSON file.
